how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes. Surgical always. chmod u+w before patching. ast.parse after every write. Test and verify BEFORE guard seal confirm.
session_043_completed: DDGS IMPORT FIX — duckduckgo_search package renamed to ddgs upstream. Uninstalled duckduckgo_search 8.1.1, ddgs 9.11.3 was already present. Patched web_search.py lines 21 and 44: 'from duckduckgo_search import DDGS' → 'from ddgs import DDGS' (2 occurrences). DDGS class name unchanged. AST clean. Sealed.

CLICKABLE HYPERLINKS IN OPS PANEL — ops_popup.py: added 'hyperlink' tag_configure (blue #7eb8f7, underline), tag_bind for Button-1/_open_url, cursor hand2/arrow on Enter/Leave. _tag_urls_in_log() scans full log content with re.compile(r'https?://\S+') and applies hyperlink tag after every non-tree push(). _open_url() finds tag range at click position and calls webbrowser.open(). Sealed.

CLICKABLE HYPERLINKS IN CANVAS EDITOR — canvas_window.py: same hyperlink tag pattern added after editor pack in _build_editor_area(). _tag_urls_in_editor() called after every push_to_canvas insert. _open_hyperlink() method added as sibling of _build_statusbar. Sealed.

MEMORY SEARCH WINDOW BUILT — New file ui/memory_search.py. Dedicated Toplevel window. Searches ~/Ethica/memory/chat/ (.txt files) and ~/Ethica/memory/vault/ (.txt files). Scope toggles: Chat logs / Vault (both on by default). Results rendered in tk.Text with tags: filename (purple, underline, clickable), source ([chat]/[vault]), excerpt (line N: text), separator. Up to 3 excerpts per file. Status bar shows N files · N matches. Click filename opens file in canvas via on_open_file callback. Sealed.

OPEN_FILE PUBLIC METHOD — canvas_window.py: added open_file(filepath) public method above _on_canvas_file_drop. Calls self.open() then self._on_canvas_file_drop(filepath). Reuses all existing routing logic (pdf, debug, document). Sealed.

SIDEBAR WIRED — sidebar.py: MemorySearchWindow imported. 'on_open_file=None' added to __init__ signature and stored as self.on_open_file. '⟁ Memory Search' button added in _build_actions() below New Conversation button. _open_memory_search() and _on_memory_file_open() methods added. main_window.py: Sidebar instantiation passes on_open_file=self._on_memory_file_open. _on_memory_file_open() calls self.canvas.open() then self.canvas.open_file(filepath). Sealed.

critical_debug_context.hyperlink_note: Hyperlinks wired in both ops_popup.py (self._log) and canvas_window.py (self._editor). Each has its own _tag_urls_in_log() / _tag_urls_in_editor() that rescans the ENTIRE widget on every push — tag_remove first, then re-apply all. If links stop working check tag_bind is still registered after _build() fires.
critical_debug_context.memory_search_note: MemorySearchWindow searches file CONTENTS not filenames. Searching a filename as query will only hit if that filename string appears inside another file's content. CHAT_DIR = ~/Ethica/memory/chat/, VAULT_DIR = ~/Ethica/memory/vault/. Max 3 excerpts per file (EXCERPT_LEN=200 chars). on_open_file callback chain: memory_search → sidebar._on_memory_file_open → main_window._on_memory_file_open → canvas.open() + canvas.open_file().
critical_debug_context.open_file_note: canvas_window.open_file() is a thin public wrapper — calls open() then _on_canvas_file_drop(). Reuses all routing: .pdf→_drop_as_pdf, DEBUG_MAP exts→debug tab, else→_drop_as_document.
critical_debug_context.ddgs_note: ddgs 9.11.3 installed in Ethica_env. DDGS class name unchanged — only package import path changed. If web_search breaks again check ddgs version compatibility.
critical_debug_context.pdf_implementation_notes: PDF tab uses mode='pdf' on CanvasTab. _switch_tab pdf branch embeds PhotoImage objects via self._editor.image_create(). Images held on tab.images[] — do NOT let this list go out of scope or images go blank. canvas is set state=DISABLED after render to prevent editing. If Pages tab shows blank — check tab.images[] is populated before _switch_tab fires.
critical_debug_context.wormbot_fix_note: sys.path injection in wormbot.py (the bridge) inserts WORMBOT_MODS so absolute imports from base_module resolve correctly. If new worm_bot language modules are added — ensure they use 'from base_module import BaseModule', not relative.
critical_debug_context.drop_zone_note: reregister_drop() is the single re-registration path after every drop. It lives at line 103 of scroll_drop.py. The inline duplicate is gone. If drop zone ever degrades again — check reregister_drop() is still being called from _on_drop via parent.after(200).
critical_debug_context.requirements_importer_note: CANVAS DROP ONLY. _scan_and_install in canvas_window.py _on_canvas_file_drop is gated to ext=='.py'. Main page drop routes .py to WormBot scan — does NOT run _scan_and_install. This is by design and documented.
critical_debug_context.drop_routing_summary: Main page drop: .pdf→_drop_as_pdf, CODE_EXTS→WormBot→Ops, else→canvas._drop_as_document. Canvas drop: all files→_drop_as_document + .py also runs _scan_and_install.

sanctuary_state.slot_7: J.A.R.V.I.S. — Infiltrator (IDLE — CVE db not yet cloned)

surgical_reminders: chmod u+w <file> before patching sealed files
guard seal confirm after every verified change
ast.parse() after every single write — no exceptions
Test and verify BEFORE sealing — never seal untested patches
grep first, sed to read, python3 to patch
Never rewrite working files from scratch
Three-place trigger registration: MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers + guard scope
NEVER reduce guard scope — ui/ coverage is deliberate
cat -A to diagnose byte corruption — em-dashes and newlines break heredoc string matching
Use binary rb/wb read/write when em-dash or special chars are in the target string
repr() first when string match fails — invisible chars are the silent killers

Double 

 between methods is common — always repr() before assuming single
lesson_learned_043: repr() before every patch attempt — double \n\n between methods appears constantly and looks like single newline in sed output. The pattern: string match fails → repr() the exact bytes → adjust old string → patch succeeds. Never retry blindly on ✗ not found.
philosophy: Session 043 — Web search speaks to its own package correctly. Every URL in Ops and canvas is now a door. Trinity can search her own memory and walk through to any file she remembers. The ecosystem grows more sovereign with every session. ⟁Σ∿∞
